paper_title: Ice Core Analysis and EC Concentration Studies

methods.description: This method involves the preparation and analysis of ice samples to measure elemental carbon (EC) concentrations. The process includes filtering melted ice samples, preparing blanks to check for contamination, and analyzing the filters using a thermal-optical method.

steps.description: The 739 ice samples were grouped for filtering so that ice samples representing the 18th century were filtered in ca.10-year resolution, of the period 1800-1850 with a 5-year resolution, and samples from the industrial era with a resolution of approximately 2 years.
steps.searchable_summary: group ice samples by historical period for filtering

steps.description: The ice was melted and immediately filtered through pre-burned (at 800°C for 4 hours) quartz fibre filters (Munktel).
steps.searchable_summary: melt and filter ice samples using quartz fibre filters

steps.description: Blanks were prepared by placing a filter in the filtering system for a minute or by filtering distilled water through a filter.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare blanks to check for contamination

steps.description: The filters were analysed for EC using a thermal-optical method at Stockholm University.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze filters for EC using thermal-optical method

methods.description: This method describes the process of drilling, retrieving, and processing ice cores from the Holtedahlfonna ice field in Svalbard for various analyses, including EC measurements.

steps.description: The Holtedahlfonna ice core was drilled in April 2005 at a saddle point where the lateral ice flow velocity is expected to be minimal.
The ice core was retrieved in ca.50-60 cm sections and immediately packed into plastic bags, subsequently stored frozen and then transported to the cold-room facilities.
steps.searchable_summary: retrieve and store ice core sections

steps.description: The ice core was cut and processed in a cold room using a cleaned thin-blade band saw.
steps.searchable_summary: cut and process ice core in cold room

steps.description: Each vertical ice core section was split into subsamples assigned to various measurements.
steps.searchable_summary: split ice core into subsamples for analysis
